case_title: KRISTINE PETTERSON VS. UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO DEFT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETTERSSON, KRISTINE AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE HEARING ON DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITED HEALTH GROUP INC., UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, LORI PUCCI AND OPTUM, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: L. FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITEDHEALTH GROUP, UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, OPTUM, INC., AND LORI PUCCI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE MINI MINUTES AND ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITEDHEALTH GROUP, UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, OPTUM, INC., AND LORI PUCCI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS ENTERED INTO AN ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT COVERS THE DISPUTES AT ISSUE IN THE LAWSUIT. DEFENDANTS DEMANDED ARBITRATION AND PLAINTIFF REFUSED TO ARBITRATE. THE AGREEMENT IS VALID, ENFORCEABLE AND NOT UNCONSCIONABLE. SEE DOTSON V. AMGEN, INC. (2010) 181 CAL.APP.4TH 975; SERPA V. CALIFORNIA SURETY INVESTIGATIONS, INC. (2013) 215 CAL.APP.4TH 695; WILSON V. UNITED HEALTH GROUP, INC. 2012 WL 6088318 (E.D. CAL. 2012). PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT HER CLAIMS TO ARBITRATION. THE PROCEEDINGS IN THIS COURT ARE STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION OR FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Mar-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant'S Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael A. Wahlander, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw, Tel. 415.397.2823, for defendant and moving party;
Brian L. Poulter, Esq. of Cohen McKeon, Tel. 213.413.6400, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. After argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITEDHEALTH GROUP, UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, OPTUM, INC., and LORI PUCCI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is Granted. Defendants have shown that Plaintiff and Defendants entered into an arbitration agreement. The arbitration agreement covers the disputes at issue in the lawsuit. Defendants demanded arbitration and Plaintiff refused to arbitrate. The agreement is valid, enforceable and not unconscionable. See Dotson v. Amgen, Inc. (2010) 181 Cal.App.4th 975; Serpa v. California Surety Investigations, Inc. (2013) 215 Cal.App.4th 695; Wilson v. United Health Group, Inc. 2012 WL 6088318 (E.D. Cal. 2012). Plaintiff is ordered to submit her claims to arbitration. The proceedings in this Court are stayed pending completion of arbitration or further order of the Court. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN POULTER, ESQ., 213.413.6400, FOR PLAINTIFF KRISTINE PETTERSON.
MICHAEL WAHLANDER, ESQ., 415.554.1015, FOR DEFENDANTS UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITED HEALTH GROUP INC., UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, LORI PUCCI AND OPTUM, INC.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court VACATED its tentative ruling. THE HEARING ON DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY, UNITED HEALTH GROUP INC., UNITED BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, LORI PUCCI and OPTUM, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
